inputs.name: @coalesce(outputs('Compose_customer_record')?['fullname'], outputs('Compose_customer_record')?['name'], if(empty(body('Get_quote')?['billto_name']), null, body('Get_quote')?['billto_name']), if(empty(body('Get_quote')?['emailaddress']), null, body('Get_quote')?['emailaddress']), concat('Quote ', coalesce(body('Get_quote')?['quotenumber'], body('Get_quote')?['name'], '')))
